benchmark_stack.kill_spec: Charter-mandated artifact (arts. 14/15/23): retired only by ratified charter amendment; the failure signal is a pattern of false refusals or a computation the journal contradicts - either is an integrity event, not a prune.
benchmark_stack.observable: Every record brief carries both lines computed by this code.
benchmark_stack.sentence: Improves the shrink-or-concentrate decision at every review by scoring the sleeve against SPY and the deployment-adjusted line, defined once and never re-fit.

calibration_ledger.kill_spec: Charter-mandated artifact (arts. 14/15/23): retired only by ratified charter amendment; the failure signal is a pattern of false refusals or a computation the journal contradicts - either is an integrity event, not a prune.
calibration_ledger.observable: calibration_table computed at every session open once grades exist; multiplier steps only per the once-defined rule.
calibration_ledger.sentence: Improves conviction sizing by routing the Kelly multiplier and stated probabilities through measured hit rates instead of recollection.

controlled_registry.kill_spec: Charter-mandated artifact (arts. 14/15/23): retired only by ratified charter amendment; the failure signal is a pattern of false refusals or a computation the journal contradicts - either is an integrity event, not a prune.
controlled_registry.observable: Every entry and grade carries registered class and tags; reclassifications carry their mapping and never reset counters.
controlled_registry.sentence: Improves sizing and calibration by fixing class and tag taxonomies so grade ladders and calibration tables cannot be gamed by renaming.

dealflow_tender_scanner.kill_spec: Backlog #13: fewer than 12 actionable listed odd-lot tenders per year, or broker mechanics make the priority un-capturable - either kills the ground and the scanner with it.
dealflow_tender_scanner.observable: Actionable tender candidates surfaced per quarter, each with its read verdict logged in proteus_dealflow.json.
dealflow_tender_scanner.sentence: Improves the odd-lot entry decision by scanning every SC TO-I filing so no listed odd-lot tender is missed while the sleeve waits in cash.

entry_schema.kill_spec: Charter-mandated artifact (arts. 14/15/23): retired only by ratified charter amendment; the failure signal is a pattern of false refusals or a computation the journal contradicts - either is an integrity event, not a prune.
entry_schema.observable: Zero grading violations traced to a missing entry duty; refusal messages list every unmet duty in one round trip.
entry_schema.sentence: Improves every position-changing decision by refusing, mechanically and before the order, any entry that violates Title I sizing, the honesty floors, or a per-entry charter duty.

eventfeed.kill_spec: If two consecutive review periods pass in which no stored event survives its document read as load-bearing for any entry or gradable shadow, the feed is not aiming anything - prune it.
eventfeed.observable: Stored events whose dates survive the document read and feed an entered or shadow-graded position; extraction error rate tracked against reads.
eventfeed.sentence: Improves event-convexity entry timing by keeping a validated, plausibility-filtered store of primary-source dated events (ITC votes, merger votes, outside dates) that AIMS the document read.

feed3_8k_financing_deadlines.kill_spec: If 60 days of scanning produces zero candidates that pass the chain-liquidity pre-gate, or the extraction false-positive rate stays above ~50% after tuning, the channel is DEAD and gets pruned.
feed3_8k_financing_deadlines.observable: Feed-sourced candidates reach the kink screen liquidity pre-gate and produce graded entries or honest journaled dispositions; the eventfeed store accumulates financing_deadline events with verified source URLs.
feed3_8k_financing_deadlines.sentence: Improves long-option entry SELECTION by supplying dated, non-merger catalysts (debt-maturity extensions, forbearance expirations from 8-Ks) that retail calendars do not carry - the exact supply gap the kink screen has been starved of since the merger-vote channel was killed 7/13.

ivkink_detector.kill_spec: If no UNPRICED kink read survives the document read to a live entry or gradable shadow within two consecutive review periods (art. 21), the detector is not finding structural mispricings and is pruned along with the priced_move_read funnel stage.
ivkink_detector.observable: Every priced_move_read candidate journal entry cites this detector verdict (PRICED/UNPRICED/UNRELIABLE with kink ratio); UNPRICED verdicts flow to document reads and PRICED verdicts are dropped without one.
ivkink_detector.sentence: Improves the go/no-go decision between an eventfeed hit and the expensive document read by mechanically testing whether the option chain has already priced the verified event date - only UNPRICED dates earn a read, aiming capital at structural (undated) mispricings instead of out-handicapping specialists.

options_plumbing.kill_spec: If the event-convexity class records 5 real-money grades with negative summed P&L, or the priced_move_read judgment type calibrates worse than 25 points off, the plumbing's ground is dead and the code goes with it.
options_plumbing.observable: First staged long-option entry passes journal, sleeve accounting, and broker dry-run without manual arithmetic.
options_plumbing.sentence: Improves event-convexity execution by making long-option accounting, chain reads, and order dry-runs mechanical so a dated-event thesis can be expressed with a bounded debit.
